title: Senior Software Engineer - Mastech Holdings - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Mastech Holdings - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mastech Holdings in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mastech Holdings:
Mastech Holdings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings!
